problem id: 16e151ec
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  00110010 -> 01100100
  11110001 -> 11100001
  11101011 -> 11010101
  11010111 -> 10101101
  11111101 -> 11111001
  10110110 -> 01101110
  01101000 -> 11010001
  11000011 -> 10000101
  00000101 -> 00001010
  00000000 -> 00000000

query: 10001101
predicted answer: 00011000
